# Stuart Gilbert Landrovers

> Independent Land Rover, Range Rover, Discovery and Defender specialist in Sittingbourne, Kent. A small father and son workshop with over 75 years of combined experience, run by Stuart and David Gilbert. By appointment only.

## Business details

- Name: Stuart Gilbert Landrovers
- Type: Independent Land Rover specialist garage (servicing, repairs, welding, modifications)
- Address: Orchards, Sittingbourne, Kent, ME9 8JX, United Kingdom
- Phone: 01795 843116 (+44 1795 843116)
- Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:15 to 17:15, by appointment only
- Areas served: Sittingbourne, Maidstone, Faversham, Medway and the wider mid-Kent area
- Servicing from around £290 + VAT including parts and labour

## What they do

- Land Rover servicing (all models, Series I through to the current L663 Defender)
- General mechanical maintenance and repairs
- Brakes, steering and suspension (standard and upgrades)
- Chassis welding
- Improvements and modifications to most models
